meaning: n.娑堟暎,鍒嗘暎,鎸ラ湇,娴垂,娑堥仯,鏀捐崱,鐙傞ギ
examples: It was designed for maximum heat dissipation.
Fortunately, Intel, AMD, and IBM have been tackling heat dissipation.
Scientists said the rapid dissipation of the surface oil was probably due to a combination of factors.
People also engage in dissipation, distraction, and rationalization to relieve the discomfort of pressure.
Enormous conviction is needed to resist this wasteful dissipation of energy into make-work techno-management.
